current_source_observation.note: Walk-only inventory observation. Does not re-hash audio bytes or rebuild the retained production index.

decision.safe_next_action: Resolve the exact live-source missing/mismatch paths recorded in byte_hash_reconciliation, re-run full retained-index byte-hash reconciliation to complete=true, then execute isolated full-library copy-then-resume replay before granting Row069 library acceptance.

fixture_calibration.determinism_note: Fixture proves durable failure-manifest emission, indexed+blocker reconciliation, source fingerprint immutability binding, resume hash stability, and copy-then-resume scaffold only; it does not accept Row069 library completion.

blockers.detail: audio file has zero bytes and cannot enter the functional index

frozen_behavior: one deterministic index across all supported audio files
resume by relative path, byte size, and mtime_ns
record exact parse/index failures in a durable failure manifest
reproduce index hash, record count, unique hash count, and failure-manifest hash
reconcile retained index byte hashes against live source before acceptance
prove full-library resume replay in an isolated workdir before acceptance

required_full_library_proof: copy retained index/summary/state into an isolated replay workdir
run build_index(source_root, replay_workdir, resume=True) without mutating retained paths
require stable functional_index_state.sqlite3 sha256 when source path/size/mtime unchanged
emit/refresh failure_manifest.json and bind its sha256 into the acceptance packet
bind live inventory fingerprint before and after the resume replay
